notInResourceChannel: 🖋 Wrong parchment. This belongs in the Resource channel.
🖋 Transactions are recorded in the Resource channel, not here.
🖋 Let’s keep the ledger tidy — use the Resource channel for this.

invalidItem: Specify the item, please. My ledger doesn’t accept ‘vibes’.
If you can’t name it, you can’t sell it. Even I have standards.
You didn’t tell me what you’re selling. Try again with a name.
invalidAmount: That’s not a valid amount. Positive numbers only.
I can’t transcribe imaginary or negative gold. Try again.
This ledger only accepts real, positive coin.
invalidPrecision: GP uses two decimal places. Please round neatly.
Too many decimals. My ink refuses to wobble that far.
Quil prefers cents, not dust. Two decimals, please.
noPlayerRecord: Hi {user}, I can’t find your character log. Please `/initiate` first, then try again.
No ledger entry for you yet, {user}. Initiate your character to record sales.
I don’t see a record for {user}. Get initiated and we’ll ink the sale.

transactionSuccess: Sale complete. **{item}** fetched **{amount} GP** |  Remaining GP: **{newGp}**.
Logged: **{item}** sold for **{amount} GP** | Current GP: **{newGp}**.
Ledger updated — **{item}** sold (**{amount} GP**) | Updated GP: **{newGp}**.
